# Copilot Instructions

This repository is a long-term knowledge base for AI-assisted software development.

Read these files before writing or reorganizing content:

1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `docs/_meta/user-context.md`
3. `docs/_meta/publishing-workflow.md`

Default writing standard:

- Write in bilingual Chinese and English unless the user explicitly asks for one language only
- Prefer concise, practical, searchable writing
- Turn solved problems into durable notes under `docs/`
- Include one real example and one clear boundary when possible
- Prefer reusable rules over chat-style explanations
